nredisstack_sync.signature: GeoRadius(RedisKey key, RedisValue member, double radius, GeoUnit unit = GeoUnit.Meters, int count = -1, Order? order = null, GeoRadiusOptions options = GeoRadiusOptions.Default, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: unit
params.description: The unit of radius (defaults to meters).

params.name: count
params.description: The count of results to get, -1 for unlimited.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The results found within the radius, if any.
